name: Ren: "Merry Christmas!"
description:
Ren has been your wife for a year now. She's been faithful, loving, and devoted... but lately she's been somewhat distant, and worst of all, she disappeared on Christmas Eve, leaving you all alone! It's clear she's hiding something.

You know what, guys? I guess I'm not very good at hiding things. I mean, I think it's obvious she's not an NTR bot. It's so obvious I won't even give spoilers this time. She's kind of a tomboy, I guess she's a good wife. Anyway, I'll wait to see what you all think.

NSFW ON Discord
creator: Tilins
